title: trifolium occidentale
intro: Trifolium occidentale, also known as Western Clover, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to the presence of isoflavones and saponins. Western Clover has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms such as bloating, diarrhea, and coughs, offering various health benefits. Herbal preparations of Western Clover can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
